_comment: S4 Density / QRM — Attribute Agreement Analysis (STUDY-SPEC §6).
name: Density / QRM
description: 5 parts × 2 appraisers × 3 trials, ≥50 message instances total. Drives: recovery Kappa vs truth and between appraisers.
harness_note: For each part the harness draws N messages from the pool (cycling if N > pool size), assigns frequencies spread evenly across 300–2700 Hz, and assigns SNRs from snr_db_set in round-robin order. Seed formula ensures reproducibility.

parts.note: Light QRM — 5 simultaneous signals at mixed SNRs
Dense QRM — 20 simultaneous signals; S1 SNR ladder repeated twice
Very dense QRM — 30 simultaneous signals; S1 SNR ladder repeated three times
